godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the deferred patch 0017 call-site gate and the patch 0018 native-handle mapping.

effect_class.native_pass_shape: single compute resolve dispatch (local_size 8x8x1, compute_list_dispatch_threads(resolution.x, resolution.y, 1)); history maintained by three physical copy_to_rect calls (resolve->temp->internal->history, velocity->prev_velocity) outside the resolve dispatch

call_sites.note: deferred patch 0017 would gate the resolve dispatch; the native resolve + history copy chain is always preserved as fallback/continuation.

descriptor_mapping.dst_shape: output extent == color extent (1:1 full-resolution resolve pass; same rule as GRX-010 tonemap)

supported_math_subset.group_shared_tile: 10x10 tile (8x8 group + 1 border) caching clamped color+depth loads
supported_math_subset.velocity: get_closest_pixel_velocity_3x3 (3x3 min-depth velocity poll, with the native border-offset quirk reproduced)
supported_math_subset.history_sampling: 9-tap Catmull-Rom; hardware bilinear textureLod reproduced as explicit float 4-tap Load bilinear with clamp addressing
supported_math_subset.history_clipping: variance clip box (clip_aabb + adaptive box_size from velocity length + variance_dynamic)
supported_math_subset.blend: Reinhard domain lerp (base 1/16 + out-of-screen reset + disocclusion boost + luminance-diff flicker suppression) then inverse Reinhard
supported_math_subset.precision: float32 kernel; parity and dispatch smoke use float32 textures

known_gaps: hardware bilinear (textureLod with a linear+clamp sampler) reproduced as explicit float 4-tap Load bilinear; interior UVs are texel-exact, real-sampler sub-texel fixed-point rounding is a recorded gap
rgba16f / rg16f half storage quantization not modelled (kernel computes float32; native buffers are half)
history physical maintenance chain (resolve->temp->internal->history via three copy_to_rect) not wired (single resolve dispatch only; native continuation maintains history every frame)
one-frame latency (a self-queue dispatch reads the previous frame's color/velocity); a true replacement needs draw_graph integration (deferred), so this slice only scaffolds the writeback
get_closest_pixel_velocity_3x3 border-offset quirk (velocity fetched at group_top_left+min_pos = pos_screen-1+offset) reproduced faithfully
imageLoad out-of-bounds returns 0 (native Vulkan semantics) reproduced by Load OOB=0
no temporal/noise stability evidence (GRX-012 plan note; 4g-level, later slice)
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical taa_resolve package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0; GRX-009 texture_artifact_provenance_policy.json applies to every texture compute pass); a rurixc-owned taa_resolve compile still requires a patched llc that supports texture intrinsics plus multi-channel texture element support in the Rurix Texture2D<F>/RWTexture2D<F> lang items

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The DEFAULT runtime path stays fallback-only: with all per-pass settings at their false defaults the bridge returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_TAA_RESOLVE and the native Godot TAA resolve renders. This slice delivers PASS_TEMPLATE S1-S4 + S6 only (contract, offline kernel, math parity, fail-closed TaaResolveGate, standalone dispatch smoke). NO Godot patch (0017-0019 are deferred to a later serial slice), NO enablement, NO close-out. real_gpu_pass=false / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=false. The shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: src/rurix-godot TaaResolveGate: preflight (int64 cap, 6 texture resources, 28-byte b0, dims match, 1:1 output shape) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_TAA_RESOLVE_REAL_PASS opt-in, non-null native handles, TaaResolveDispatchPackage layout/digest match vs offline evidence) -> per-slot kernel-binding-kind conformance ([texture2d x5, rwtexture2d]) -> math-parity gate (taa_resolve_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real dispatch only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; every failure records a fallback reason and prints the once-per-session RXGD_TAA_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED diagnostic
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: deferred: patches 0017-0019 (pass-gate + call-site / runtime native-handle binding / recording-smoke + real-pass opt-in) are reserved in PATCH_ALLOCATION.md and belong to a later serial (stack-locked) slice; this slice produces no patch

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.purpose: Prove the tracked offline taa_resolve DXIL container + RTS0 root signature + descriptor layout can complete one minimal compute dispatch on a real D3D12 device/command queue with 5 SRVs (t0..t4) + 1 UAV (u0) AND that every measured GPU output texel matches the CPU reference (single-frame TAA resolve on a deterministic synthetic fixture) within tolerance. Standalone measured evidence only; the bridge records no dispatch and returns no OK.
does_not_imply: Godot runtime TAA resolve pass completion
any visual diff, measured fallback telemetry, temporal stability, or performance claim

remaining_segments: Godot patch 0017-0019 (pass-gate/call-site, runtime native-handle binding, recording-smoke + real-pass opt-in; history physical maintenance chain and draw_graph true replacement design)
Godot runtime bridge dispatch recording smoke (4f-level, needs a full patch-stack scratch rebuild)
in-engine real visual diff + measured fallback telemetry gate (4g-level; temporal/noise stability evidence)
gated real-pass enablement gate and measured success (4h-level)
hardware-sampler true replacement, half storage quantization parity, draw_graph one-frame-latency true replacement
per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

evidence_requirements.visual: in-engine LDR absolute diff (GRX-009 segment 4g template) is a later slice; not produced here
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-012 taa_resolve is at the segment-A level (PASS_TEMPLATE S1-S4 + S6): the taa_resolve pass contract, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, runtime-mappable per the owner-approved GRX-009 texture artifact provenance policy), the CPU-proven math parity, the fail-closed bridge TaaResolveGate (default RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK; opt-in RXGD_CAP_TAA_RESOLVE_REAL_PASS arm linked only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature), and the standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke. implemented=false / real_gpu_pass=false / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=false: no Godot patch, no enablement, no close-out in this slice. The DEFAULT path stays fallback-only, default_enable_state stays disabled, the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and NO visual-superiority, temporal-stability, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
